description: lib.rs:111-117 — The custom Debug impl on MemBackend uses finish_non_exhaustive() to show the key name but omit the Arc<RwLock<Map>> field entirely. This is a deliberate, correct choice: it prevents format!("{:?}", backend) from dumping secret bytes into logs, error messages, or panic output. Worth defending in review.
title: Good: Debug impl redacts secret material
